overall.description: Third-person gameplay from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in a white hat and red coat riding in a vintage train carriage through rural American prairie. The train passes through open grasslands, rocky cuttings, and finally enters a dark tunnel.

scene_state.functional_zone: passenger train carriage with prairie views

agents.ego_description: sitting by the window calmly observing the passing grassland scenery

notable_agents.action: another passenger sitting further down the carriage facing away from camera

entered.detail: wooden paneled train interior with green velvet bench seats and lace curtains
upholstered bench seats with brass fittings
decorative lace valances above the windows
rolling green grasslands passing by the window
mature oak trees dotting the prairie landscape

segments.scene_description: The segment opens inside a vintage train carriage with wooden paneling and green velvet seats. Through the window, open prairie grasslands with scattered oak trees pass by in bright afternoon sunlight. The character sits calmly observing the scenery while another passenger sits further down the carriage.

scene_state.functional_zone: train passing through narrow rocky cutting

events.description: train enters rocky cutting with close rock walls visible through window
interior becomes significantly darker as train passes through shaded rocky area

agents.ego_description: continues sitting as the landscape outside changes to rocky terrain

entered.detail: tall rock walls passing very close to the train window

segments.scene_description: The train enters a narrow rocky cutting, with tall stone walls passing close to the windows. The interior lighting dims significantly as the train moves through the shaded rocky passage, temporarily blocking the view of the open prairie.

scene_state.functional_zone: train carriage in open prairie with distant views

events.description: train exits rocky cutting back into open grassland with bright sunlight
character turns head to look around the carriage interior

agents.ego_description: sitting and watching the scenery, then turns head to look around the carriage

entered.detail: open green fields returning to view
rolling hills visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The train emerges back into open prairie with bright sunlight streaming through the windows. The landscape shows rolling grasslands with distant hills. The character briefly turns their head to look around the carriage before continuing to watch the passing scenery.

events.description: train approaches dark tunnel entrance through rocky cutting
interior becomes very dark as train enters the tunnel

agents.ego_description: sitting as the train enters the darkness of the tunnel

entered.detail: dark opening of the tunnel approaching
shadowed rock formations at the tunnel mouth

segments.scene_description: The train approaches a dark tunnel entrance through a final rocky cutting. The interior rapidly darkens as the train enters the tunnel, with only the dim interior lights visible as the clip ends in near-total darkness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous perspective inside a vintage train carriage as the surrounding landscape shifts from bright, open prairies to the oppressive darkness of a tunnel. It begins with the camera observing a character seated among green velvet seats and wooden paneling, while sunlit grasslands and scattered oak trees glide past the window. As the train enters a narrow rocky cutting, the bright afternoon light dims significantly, replaced by the looming presence of tall stone walls passing close to the glass. The scene then opens back into the brilliant sunlight of rolling grasslands and distant hills before the train approaches a final rocky passage. Finally, the interior rapidly darkens as the carriage plunges into a tunnel, leaving only dim interior lights visible before fading into near-total darkness.
